name: Tomates and Kale
recipeIngredient: 1 can (approx. 16 oz) ready-cut tomatoes in juice
Italian-style seasonings to taste (1/2 tsp mixed oregano, basil, and rosemary is a good place to start)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut or tear the kale into bite-sized pieces.
2. Place the kale in a colander and rinse under running water. Do not drain too thoroughly; keep some water on the leaves.
3. Place the washed kale in a non-stick frying pan over medium heat.
4. Stir until the kale leaves wilt.
5. Add the ready-cut tomatoes, reserving the juice. Sprinkle the seasonings over the pan and continue to stir for a few moments until the tomatoes are heated through.
6. Add reserved tomato juice to taste; more will make a soup-like dish, while less will result in a traditional side dish.
